events.message: Checked out toolkit repo and read AGENT.md setup instructions.
Verified Node.js, pac, .NET 10 SDK, GitHub CLI, and Git are installed.
Verified Dataverse MCP connectivity and installed project-scoped Power Apps skills.
Started local dashboard server at http://127.0.0.1:4817 using direct Node fallback.
Verified Power Apps Canvas MCP list_controls succeeded.
Added SharePoint-based XMarque Workforce data model, relationships, screen plan, and design system to dashboard state for review.
Created Azure DevOps project XMarque Workforce in VeldarrProjects.
Prepared XMarque Workforce backlog JSON and creation script; work items pending user confirmation.
Created Azure DevOps backlog hierarchy: 5 Epics, 14 Features, 28 User Stories, and 4 shared queries. Removed two orphan work items from initial failed relation attempt.
Updated Azure DevOps toolkit guidance with repeatable backlog script, Parent relation fix, idempotent work item creation, and REST shared query creation fallback.
Created XMarque Workforce SharePoint site, provisioned MVP lists and relationships, verified indexed filter columns, and closed Azure DevOps SharePoint foundation items 36-39.
